title: WorkerDirEntry
description: One row of the org-state.md Worker Directory Registry. Polymorphic posture: legacy keys worker/pane/dir kept alongside canonical task_id/pane_id/pane_name/worker_dir during the v1->v2 transition.

worker.description: Legacy alias for task_id; preserved under polymorphic posture.

pane.description: Legacy alias absorbed into pane_id (numeric) or pane_name (text).

dir.description: Legacy alias for worker_dir; preserved under polymorphic posture.
